description_long: This is a semi-hollow electric guitar with a double-cutaway body made of polished wood, featuring a natural brown finish and visible wood grain. The front face displays two f-holes, two humbucker pickups, a bridge, and four control knobs, as well as a pickup selector switch. The neck is long and black, with a rosewood or ebony fretboard and white inlays marking the frets. The headstock is black with six tuning pegs arranged three on each side, and no visible logo. The back of the guitar is smooth, showing the same wood finish as the front, with a contoured shape for comfort. Metal hardware is visible on the bridge, pickups, and tuning pegs, giving the instrument a classic, professional appearance.
description: A natural-finish, semi-hollow electric guitar with a double-cutaway body, f-holes, dual pickups, and a black neck with white inlays.
description_view_0: Side view showing the guitar's slim profile, black neck, and the thickness of the semi-hollow body.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the smooth, natural wood grain back and the black headstock with six tuning pegs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the body depth and the contour of the guitar's back and neck.
description_view_3: Front view revealing the f-holes, dual pickups, four control knobs, pickup selector, and the detailed fretboard with white inlays.
attribute_headstock_design: Black headstock with three tuning pegs on each side, no visible logo, standard symmetrical shape
